meaning: n.欧里庇得斯(希腊的悲剧诗人)
examples: A medieval manuscript called L contains all eighteen extant tragedies by the Greek playwright Euripides.
Euripides, as translated by John Milton, 1644
And yes, it is as stupid as set forth in Aristophanes or Euripides.
As for malice, mayhem and pervasive nastiness, the great Western canon goes all the way back to Euripides.
